view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where an auto-offer is triggered upon cancellation, but the evidence does not confirm that this behavior is implemented or tested. While the linked use case describes the cascading effect of cancellations, it does not provide concrete evidence that the system generates an auto-offer as expected. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence to support the expected outcome.
